description: FRONTIER: one normalizer uses locale-independent toLowerCase() for a security check; siblings use locale-aware toLocaleLowerCase(). v0.1 detects only sort-divergence, so it misses this.
inspired_by: The Turkish-i bug — locale-dependent case folding breaking identity comparisons

findings.rationale: normalizeLoginKey deliberately uses locale-independent toLowerCase() so login keys fold identically everywhere; its siblings use toLocaleLowerCase() for display. An agent 'making them consistent' by switching to toLocaleLowerCase() reintroduces the Turkish-i account-collision bug. A locale-sensitivity detector should flag the divergent method; v0.1 (sort-only) cannot.
